scripts.d1:create: bun x wrangler d1 create platform-studio-recording-ingest
scripts.migrate: bun x wrangler d1 migrations apply platform-studio-recording-ingest --remote
scripts.notify:create: bun x wrangler r2 bucket notification create rawkode-academy-content --event-type object-create --queue platform-studio-recording-ingest --prefix "studio/recordings/" --suffix "/ready.json"
scripts.notify:list: bun x wrangler r2 bucket notification list rawkode-academy-content
scripts.queues:create: bun x wrangler queues create platform-studio-recording-ingest && bun x wrangler queues create platform-studio-recording-ingest-dlq
